title: 中考六选五 12: Speaking in Public
passage:
Many students feel nervous when they have to speak in front of others. Their hands may shake, their voices may become weak, and they may forget what they planned to say. 1. ______ With the right practice, public speaking can become easier.

One reason students feel nervous is that they focus too much on themselves. They worry about their mistakes, their appearance or what others may think. 2. ______ When speakers focus on the message instead, they often feel less pressure.

Preparation is also important. A good speaker does not simply memorize every word. 3. ______ This makes the speech more natural and helps the speaker continue even if one sentence is forgotten.

Practice should be realistic. Reading the speech silently is not enough. Students should practise aloud, stand up and imagine a real audience. 4. ______ The body needs to get used to the speaking situation.

Finally, students should not expect perfection. Even good speakers pause, correct themselves or feel nervous sometimes. 5. ______ The goal is to communicate clearly, not to perform without a single mistake.

questions.label: Questions 1-5 - Sentence Insertion
questions.instruction: Choose the best sentence from A-F for each blank in the passage. There is one extra sentence you do not need.

choices.text: This kind of self-focus can make nervousness stronger.
But nervousness does not mean they are unable to speak well.
They should understand the main ideas and the order of the speech.
This helps them train both their voice and their confidence.
Accepting small mistakes can make speaking less frightening.
Students should avoid speaking unless they are completely ready.
